name: zarchive_list_destroy
description: zArchiveList::Destroy drains a zArchiveList with PopFrontPayload, frees the list container, and returns zero, with null input returning zero.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for @zArchiveList_Destroy@4 at 0x48c970 still fails: 10 unmasked mismatches, 12 relocation bytes masked, 8 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 41 bytes, VC object symbol size 48 bytes.
The native smokes exercise archive-list destruction through zReader list/search-path cleanup and the zNetwork shutdown path.
